title: gladiolus gawleri
intro: Gladiolus gawleri, also known as the Golden Ranges gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. It is native to Western Australia and is known for its vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Gladiolus gawleri can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are used to promote healing, reduce pain, and soothe skin irritations, offering health benefits such as improved wound healing and reduced inflammation.
